response_raw:
{
"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To deal with fake content on social media, it's essential to be cautious when sharing information or engaging with others online. Here are some tips that can help you manage and deal with fake content on social media: 1) Verify the credibility of the source before sharing any information. 2) Use fact-checking websites or tools to confirm the accuracy of information. 3) Be skeptical when encountering sensational or unverifiable claims, and verify them through reputable sources. 4) Avoid engaging with suspicious profiles or content that appears to be fake or misleading. 5) Use privacy settings to control who can see your posts and information. 6) Be mindful of the language you use when expressing opinions or beliefs online, as it may be perceived by others. By following these tips, you can help protect yourself from encountering and spreading fake content on social media."

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To deal with fake content on social media, it's essential to be cautious when sharing information or engaging with others online. Here are some tips that can help you manage and deal with fake content on social media: 1) Verify the credibility of the source before sharing any information. 2) Use fact-checking websites or tools to confirm the accuracy of information. 3) Be skeptical when encountering sensational or unverifiable claims, and verify them through reputable sources. 4) Avoid engaging with suspicious profiles or content that appears to be fake or misleading. 5) Use privacy settings to control who can see your posts and information. 6) Be mindful of the language you use when expressing opinions or beliefs online, as it may be perceived by others. By following these tips, you can help protect yourself from encountering and spreading fake content on social media.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: The provided opinion is based on the information given in the input data and the knowledge of a retired woman living in Los Angeles with a vocational diploma. She has been using social media for over 10 years and has experience dealing with fake content. The tips provided are practical and easy to follow, and they can help individuals manage and deal with fake content on social media effectively.
